title: Bridge Essay: Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanisms.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanisms.** - Conscious Cogn (2019). DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2019.05.008. PMID: 31228696. Some people seem to have a 'talent' for spiritual experience: they readily sense the presence of supernatural beings, receive special messages from God, and report intense feelings of self-transcendence, awe and wonder. Here we review converging strands of evidence to argue that the trait of 'absorption' captures a general proclivity for having spiritual experiences.
